title: Community Workbench SDK
description: The Community Workbench SDK provides developers and advanced researchers with programmatic tools to build, extend, and integrate custom analysis modules within the Parthenon platform. It enables creation of reusable study components that can be shared across the research network.
tips: Review the SDK documentation thoroughly before beginning development to understand the module lifecycle and integration points.
Package your custom modules with version metadata and dependency declarations to ensure compatibility across platform updates.
Test SDK modules against a representative sample dataset before deploying to a full federated network.
Follow the platform coding standards to ensure your contributions pass the community review process.
Use the SDK's built-in logging hooks to facilitate debugging and audit trail generation for custom modules.
